overview: Slime is a Normal-class Ooze/Beast monster found in Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 18 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Up at 200% ratio (360 base damage). Sight range 1200, combat radius 80.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Attacked
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Attacked icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Mounted
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Mounted icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Poison Pools
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Poison Pools icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Ice, Light, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-3000), Ice (-3000), Light (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Up (200% ratio)
strategies.description: Up deals 360 damage at base (200% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1200 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1200 units, loses target at 1800 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 80, ability check distance 120
strategies.description: Combat area radius 80. Ability check distance 120. Ability attack delay: 0.4s.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1200 units. Loses target at 1800 units.
